name: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Script Interpreter Execution From Suspicious Folder
notes:
This Building Block detects a suspicious script executions in temporary folders or folders accessible by environment variables.

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Florian Roth
SIGMA Title: Script Interpreter Execution From Suspicious Folder
SIGMA Description: Detects a suspicious script executions in temporary folders or folders accessible by environment variables


Confidence: MEDIUM

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Script Interpreter Execution From Suspicious Folder on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success
when the event matches Process Name (custom) is any of [powershell.exe or pwsh.exe or mshta.exe or wscript.exe or cscript.exe or cmd.exe]

when the event matches (LOWER("Command") LIKE '% -w hidden %' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '% -ep bypass %' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%/e:vbscript %' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%/e:javascript %') AQL filter query
when the event matches Process Path (custom) contains any of [\Temporary Internet or \AppData\Local\Temp or \AppData\Roaming\Temp or C:\Users\Public\ or C:\Perflogs\]
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviorDefinition: Script Interpreter Execution From Suspicious Folder on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success
AND when the event matches Process Name (custom) is any of [powershell.exe or pwsh.exe or mshta.exe or wscript.exe or cscript.exe or cmd.exe]

AND when the event matches (LOWER("Command") LIKE '% -w hidden %' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '% -ep bypass %' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%/e:vbscript %' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%/e:javascript %') AQL filter query
AND when the event matches Process Path (custom) contains any of [\Temporary Internet or \AppData\Local\Temp or \AppData\Roaming\Temp or C:\Users\Public\ or C:\Perflogs\]
